occurrence_sentence: The LG Electronics team's proposal, published in Scientific Reports, introduces a high-dimensional, single-photon-based QSDC protocol that utilizes two optical degrees of freedom: time and phase state.

The [LG Electronics](https://www.lgcorp.com/innovation/sciencepark/pr) team's proposal, published in [Scientific Reports](https://www.nature.com/srep), introduces a high-dimensional, single-photon-based QSDC protocol that utilizes two optical degrees of freedom: time and phase state.

interaction_phrase: LG Electronics research team includes Byungkyu Ahn
occurrence_sentence: LG Electronics research team includes Byungkyu Ahn, Jooyoun Park, Jonghyun Lee and Sangrim Lee.

interaction_phrase: LG Electronics research team includes Byungkyu Ahn
occurrence_sentence: LG Electronics research team includes Byungkyu Ahn, Jooyoun Park, Jonghyun Lee and Sangrim Lee.

interaction_phrase: Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for The Quantum Insider
occurrence_sentence: With a several-decades long background in journalism and communications, Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience. He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
